title: Contract C02: Research → Story
description: Governs the transition from Stage 2 (Source Verification) to Stages 3–5 (Story Outline, Script, Story Bible). Defines what verified research.json must contain before story work begins, what story.json must produce, and how template requirements are enforced.

input.description: Fields from research.json that Stages 3–5 require before proceeding.

required_fields.purpose: Only a fully verified research document feeds the story. NEEDS_REVISION halts Stage 3.
No failed facts may feed the story.
Explicit gate — story stages check this field before proceeding.
Script must reference at least 5 verified facts by fact_id. Template beats may require specific fact types (timeline events, canonical numbers).
Named entities in research feed story_bible.canonical_names. At least 3 distinct named entities required.
If present, at least 2 events required for a documentary with historical_context beat.

preconditions: All FLAG items have adjusted_claim set and original claim is not used in story

output.description: What story.json must contain when Stages 3–5 complete.

outline_required_fields.purpose: Minimum: INTRO, ACT_I, ACT_II, OUTRO. Additional sections for longer videos.
List of template beats required by the niche. Must all appear in beats_present.
Must be a superset of beats_required. Missing beats = FAIL.
Each section must have a word_count_target. Sum must equal story.script.word_count_target.

script_required_fields.purpose: Must be within 5% of target_word_count. Calculated as duration_minutes × 130 × language_multiplier.
Must match the register defined for the language profile (e.g. desu_masu for Japanese).
Hook must be ≤65 words. Hooks exceeding this lose viewer attention before visual hook lands.

minimum_by_duration.description: 5× [PAUSE:2s] minimum for a 12-minute video. Scales proportionally.

script_required_fields.purpose: Pauses are required for pacing. For japanese_mystery template: minimum 5.
Dark documentary outro ends with a reflective question to the viewer (japan_template requirement).
Each line has line_id (L[0-9]{3}), type, text, section_id. Narration lines carry the word count.
Template compliance check must pass before story.json is delivered to Stage 6.

story_bible_required_fields.purpose: Every named entity from research.entities must appear in canonical_names with preferred_spelling.
At least one canonical date required. Dates must match research.timeline_events.
All population/quantity facts in research must be canonicalized with precision qualifier.
At least one entry required. Forbidden phrases must have replacement and reason.

constraints: Script must not use any expression in story_bible.off_limits_expressions.forbidden
Script must not use adjusted_claim verbatim — apply language from adjusted_claim into narration
Script may not assert facts with status=unverified as definitive — must hedge with 'とされています' or similar
Script may not reference facts with status=fail at all
All canonical numbers in script must match research.facts exactly (no rounding up to round numbers)
Hook must be in the language specified by project.language

checks.action_on_fail: Stage 3 must not start. Return to Stage 2.

checks.description: All beats in outline.beats_required are present in outline.beats_present
checks.action_on_fail: Return to Stage 3. Identify which beat is missing. Add section.
Return to Stage 4. Expand or trim narration.
Return to Stage 4. Rewrite OUTRO section last line as a reflective question.
Return to Stage 4. Resolve all template_compliance.issues.

checks.description: No off_limits_expressions.forbidden phrase appears in script.lines[*].text
checks.action_on_fail: Return to Stage 4. Replace forbidden phrase with story_bible replacement.
Return to Stage 4. Re-register all narration lines.

failure_conditions.human_action: Identify which section should contain the missing beat. Add or expand section.
If too long: identify which sections are overweight. Trim filler. If too short: expand factual sections.
Search script for forbidden phrase. Apply story_bible.replacement.
Identify which lines cite failed facts. Remove or replace with verified alternative.

recovery_strategy.strategy: Identify the section that logically contains the missing beat by comparing beat purpose against section themes. If no existing section fits, insert a new section between the two closest thematic sections. Adjust word distribution to accommodate. Re-validate template_compliance.

Identify sections with highest word density relative to their time allocation. Trim descriptive language. Prefer removing low-information-density sentences over cutting factual claims. Target: reach 5% tolerance before cutting factual content.
Identify sections with lowest word density. Expand with verified facts from research.json not yet used in script. Add sensory/atmospheric description that does not assert unverified facts.
Scan all narration lines for non-register verb forms. For Japanese desu_masu: convert plain form verbs to polite form. Do not change meaning.

required_beats.description: Contextualizes the subject within Japanese cultural or historical framework. Not generic — must name specific Japanese cultural concept.
required_beats.example: 企業城下町 (company castle town) concept for Hashima.

required_beats.description: Contrasts popular myth/media image with historical truth. Must explicitly name the myth source (e.g. 'James Bond film') and the factual correction.
required_beats.example: Skyfall image vs actual departure records.

required_beats.description: Acknowledges what Japanese sources tend not to say directly. Does not speculate — notes official silences and what they mean structurally.
required_beats.example: Japanese government's Meiji industrial heritage framing vs. labor history omission.

required_beats.description: Dedicated silence moment (間). No narration. Visual only. Minimum 10 seconds. Maximum 60 seconds. Must be a genuine contemplative pause — not a transition.
required_beats.example: 40-second shot of empty corridors, no narration, ambient sound only.
